tokens.description: Machine-readable Design Token export for automatic Figma Variable / Style generation.

default.value: 'Pretendard', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Apple SD Gothic Neo', 'Malgun Gothic', sans-serif
'Pretendard', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Apple SD Gothic Neo', 'Malgun Gothic', sans-serif
'Paperlogy', 'Pretendard', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Apple SD Gothic Neo', 'Malgun Gothic', sans-serif
'Noto Sans KR', 'Pretendard', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Apple SD Gothic Neo', 'Malgun Gothic', sans-serif

design.name: TDS — Figma Dev Tools Design System
design.description: Metadata-driven Design System manifest. A Figma plugin can consume this to generate Components, Component Sets, Variant/Component Properties, and bind Auto Layout to token variables — no per-component logic.

components.name: Icon
components.description: Reusable SVG icon system rendered on a 24×24 grid with `currentColor`. Supports size, color, stroke width and filled/stroke modes.

figmaProperties.name: Icon
figmaProperties.description: The glyph to render. Each name maps to a Figma vector/component.

figmaProperties.name: Title
figmaProperties.description: Accessible label; omit for decorative icons.

notes: Decorative icons are aria-hidden; provide `title` to expose an accessible name.

components.responsive: Scales with the `size` prop; inherits color from text context.

components.name: A Type - Button
components.description: Primary interactive control. Fully token-driven across five visual types and six tones, with loading and icon affordances.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Content layout preset — A: label only · B: icon + label · C: icon only (square).

figmaProperties.name: Style
figmaProperties.description: Visual emphasis / fill style of the button.

notes: Uses native <button>; `aria-busy` while loading; disabled removes it from the tab order.

components.responsive: `fullWidth` stretches to container; sizes scale via control-height tokens.

components.name: B Type - Button
components.description: Primary interactive control. Fully token-driven across five visual types and six tones, with loading and icon affordances.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Content layout preset — A: label only · B: icon + label · C: icon only (square).

figmaProperties.name: Style
figmaProperties.description: Visual emphasis / fill style of the button.

notes: Uses native <button>; `aria-busy` while loading; disabled removes it from the tab order.

components.responsive: `fullWidth` stretches to container; sizes scale via control-height tokens.

components.name: C Type - Button
components.description: Primary interactive control. Fully token-driven across five visual types and six tones, with loading and icon affordances.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Content layout preset — A: label only · B: icon + label · C: icon only (square).

figmaProperties.name: Style
figmaProperties.description: Visual emphasis / fill style of the button.

notes: Uses native <button>; `aria-busy` while loading; disabled removes it from the tab order.

components.responsive: `fullWidth` stretches to container; sizes scale via control-height tokens.

components.name: IconButton
components.description: Square, icon-only action. Requires an accessible label.

notes: `label` is mandatory for screen readers.

components.responsive: Fixed square dimensions per size token.

components.name: Text
components.description: Typography primitive. Every visual style maps to a Text Style token, so React text and Figma Text Styles stay in lockstep.

notes: Use the `as` prop to keep a correct heading hierarchy independent of visual style.

components.responsive: Font sizes are fluid via tokens; pair with layout components for reflow.

components.name: Label
components.description: Form field label with required/optional and disabled affordances.

figmaProperties.name: Hint
figmaProperties.description: Trailing help-circle icon with this accessible label.

figmaProperties.name: Html For
figmaProperties.description: Associates the label with a control id.

notes: Use `htmlFor` to bind to the control for click-to-focus and screen readers.

components.responsive: Inline-block; wraps with content.

components.name: Link
components.description: Navigational text link with tone and underline options; supports external affordance.

notes: External links get rel="noopener noreferrer" and an accessible “(opens in new tab)” hint.

components.responsive: Inline; inherits surrounding line-height.

components.name: Input
components.description: Single-line text field with three visual types, adornment slots and the full validation-state matrix.

figmaProperties.name: Clearable
figmaProperties.description: Show a clear (×) button while the field has a value.

notes: Pair with FormField for a programmatic label + error association (aria-describedby).

components.responsive: Fills container width; height scales with size tokens.

components.name: Textarea
components.description: Multi-line text field sharing the Input visual language and state matrix.

notes: Pair with FormField for label + error association.

components.responsive: Fills container width; height grows with `rows` / user resize.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Binary (and indeterminate) selection control with an optional label.

figmaProperties.name: Description
figmaProperties.description: Secondary helper line under the label.

notes: Uses a native <input type="checkbox"> visually replaced by a styled box.

components.responsive: Control size fixed by tokens; label wraps.

components.name: Radio
components.description: Single-choice selection control, grouped by shared `name`.

figmaProperties.name: Description
figmaProperties.description: Secondary helper line under the label.

components.responsive: Fixed control size; label wraps.

components.name: Switch
components.description: On/off toggle for immediate settings changes.

notes: Native checkbox with role="switch"; label is programmatically associated.

components.responsive: Fixed track size; label wraps.

components.name: Badge
components.description: Compact status/label indicator. Non-interactive.

figmaProperties.name: Count
figmaProperties.description: Numeric value; renders as {max}+ above the cap.

notes: Decorative by default; convey status in text, not color alone.

components.responsive: Intrinsic width; wraps with surrounding text.

components.name: Tag
components.description: Static, optionally-dismissable keyword label for categorisation.

notes: Dismiss control carries its own aria-label.

components.responsive: Intrinsic width; wraps in tag lists.

components.name: Chip
components.description: Interactive, selectable/removable token for filters and multi-select input.

notes: Selectable chips expose aria-pressed; remove control has its own label.

components.responsive: Intrinsic width; wraps in chip groups.

components.name: Avatar
components.description: Represents a user or entity via image, initials or icon fallback, with optional status.

notes: Provide `name` for the accessible label; falls back to initials or an icon on image error.

components.responsive: Fixed sizes per token; use within flex/grid layouts.

components.name: Divider
components.description: Visual or semantic separator between content, with an optional inline label.

notes: Renders `role="separator"` with matching `aria-orientation`.

components.responsive: Horizontal stretches to container width; vertical to container height.

components.name: Spinner
components.description: Indeterminate loading indicator driven by Motion tokens.

notes: Announces via `role="status"` and a visually-hidden label.

components.responsive: Fixed sizes via tokens; inherits color from `tone`.

components.name: Progress
components.description: Linear progress indicator supporting determinate and indeterminate modes.

notes: Exposes aria-valuenow / aria-valuemin / aria-valuemax.

components.responsive: Fills container width; height per size token.

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Contextual label revealed on hover/focus of a trigger, with a Motion-token entrance.

notes: Associated to the trigger via aria-describedby.

components.responsive: Repositions via `placement`; content wraps at max-width.

components.name: Image
components.description: Responsive image with aspect-ratio, object-fit, loading skeleton and error fallback.

notes: `alt` is required for informative images; use empty string for decorative.

components.responsive: Fills container; maintains chosen aspect ratio across breakpoints.

components.name: Skeleton
components.description: Loading placeholder that mimics the shape of content while it loads. Text, circle and rectangle shapes with an optional shimmer animation.

notes: Renders `aria-hidden` bones inside a `role="status"` live region; announce loading at the container level.

components.responsive: Width defaults to 100% of the container; height follows the current line-height for text shapes.

components.name: Slider
components.description: Single-value range slider built on a native <input type="range"> for full keyboard and accessibility support, styled across sizes and tones with a live value readout.

notes: Native range input exposes value/min/max to assistive tech; pass `aria-label` when there is no visible label.

components.responsive: Fills container width; the thumb and track scale with `size`.

components.name: A Type - Sparkline
components.description: Compact, axis-less trend chart sized to sit inline with text or in a stat tile. Token-driven SVG. Type A: line (with optional emphasized endpoint) · Type B: bars.

notes: Rendered as `role="img"` with an `aria-label`; pair with a visible value for meaning.

components.responsive: Fixed width/height; meant to be small and inline.

components.name: B Type - Sparkline
components.description: Compact, axis-less trend chart sized to sit inline with text or in a stat tile. Token-driven SVG. Type A: line (with optional emphasized endpoint) · Type B: bars.

notes: Rendered as `role="img"` with an `aria-label`; pair with a visible value for meaning.

components.responsive: Fixed width/height; meant to be small and inline.

components.name: SocialLoginButton
components.description: OAuth continue-with button. One brand-locked variant per provider (Kakao, Naver, Apple, Google, Facebook, email) — each carries its official palette and logo mark. Supports a full-width label form and a compact circular icon-only form.

figmaProperties.name: Provider
figmaProperties.description: OAuth provider. Selects the brand palette and logo mark.

figmaProperties.name: Label
figmaProperties.description: CTA text. Defaults to the provider’s localized label.

figmaProperties.name: Icon Only
figmaProperties.description: Render as a circular mark-only button (label becomes the aria-label).

notes: Native <button>; brand fills are locked per provider (official palettes), not theme tokens.
Icon-only form exposes the provider label via `aria-label`.

components.responsive: `fullWidth` stretches to the container; sizes scale via control-height tokens.

components.name: FormField
components.description: Composes Label + control + hint/error text and wires the accessibility relationships (id, aria-describedby, aria-invalid).

figmaProperties.name: Error
figmaProperties.description: Error message with alert icon (overrides hint).

notes: Generates a stable id and passes it to the control via cloning/render-prop.
Binds hint and error text with aria-describedby; sets aria-invalid when errored.

components.responsive: Horizontal layout collapses to vertical below the tablet breakpoint.

components.name: A Type - TextField
components.description: Label + Input composed into a ready-to-use field. Three purpose-built layouts: Type A (stacked label), Type B (floating label), Type C (inline label). Wires the accessibility relationships automatically.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: A — label stacked above · B — floating label · C — label inline (left).

figmaProperties.name: Error
figmaProperties.description: Error message with alert icon (overrides hint).

notes: The label is programmatically bound to the input via htmlFor/id.
Hint and error are linked with aria-describedby; aria-invalid is set on error.

components.responsive: Type C collapses from inline to stacked below the tablet breakpoint; all types fill the container.

components.name: B Type - TextField
components.description: Label + Input composed into a ready-to-use field. Three purpose-built layouts: Type A (stacked label), Type B (floating label), Type C (inline label). Wires the accessibility relationships automatically.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: A — label stacked above · B — floating label · C — label inline (left).

figmaProperties.name: Error
figmaProperties.description: Error message with alert icon (overrides hint).

notes: The label is programmatically bound to the input via htmlFor/id.
Hint and error are linked with aria-describedby; aria-invalid is set on error.

components.responsive: Type C collapses from inline to stacked below the tablet breakpoint; all types fill the container.

components.name: C Type - TextField
components.description: Label + Input composed into a ready-to-use field. Three purpose-built layouts: Type A (stacked label), Type B (floating label), Type C (inline label). Wires the accessibility relationships automatically.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: A — label stacked above · B — floating label · C — label inline (left).

figmaProperties.name: Error
figmaProperties.description: Error message with alert icon (overrides hint).

notes: The label is programmatically bound to the input via htmlFor/id.
Hint and error are linked with aria-describedby; aria-invalid is set on error.

components.responsive: Type C collapses from inline to stacked below the tablet breakpoint; all types fill the container.

components.name: SearchInput
components.description: Search field composing Input with a leading search icon, clear affordance and submit-on-Enter.
components.responsive: Fills container width.

components.name: Select
components.description: Accessible single-select built on a native <select> styled to match the Input language.

notes: Uses the platform listbox for full a11y + mobile support.

components.responsive: Fills container width; native popup adapts per platform.

components.name: A Type - Tabs
components.description: Compound tabbed navigation (Tabs, Tabs.List, Tabs.Tab, Tabs.Panel) with roving-tabindex keyboard support.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Orientation preset — A: tabs on top · B: tabs on the left (vertical) · C: tabs on the bottom.

notes: Implements the WAI-ARIA Tabs pattern with aria-selected + aria-controls.

components.responsive: Tab list scrolls horizontally on overflow; stretch fills width.

components.name: B Type - Tabs
components.description: Compound tabbed navigation (Tabs, Tabs.List, Tabs.Tab, Tabs.Panel) with roving-tabindex keyboard support.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Orientation preset — A: tabs on top · B: tabs on the left (vertical) · C: tabs on the bottom.

notes: Implements the WAI-ARIA Tabs pattern with aria-selected + aria-controls.

components.responsive: Tab list scrolls horizontally on overflow; stretch fills width.

components.name: C Type - Tabs
components.description: Compound tabbed navigation (Tabs, Tabs.List, Tabs.Tab, Tabs.Panel) with roving-tabindex keyboard support.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Orientation preset — A: tabs on top · B: tabs on the left (vertical) · C: tabs on the bottom.

notes: Implements the WAI-ARIA Tabs pattern with aria-selected + aria-controls.

components.responsive: Tab list scrolls horizontally on overflow; stretch fills width.

components.name: A Type - Accordion
components.description: Compound disclosure list (Accordion, Accordion.Item, Accordion.Trigger, Accordion.Content) with single/multiple modes and animated expansion.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: divided rows · B: separated cards.

notes: Trigger is a button with aria-expanded; content region is aria-labelledby the trigger.

components.responsive: Full width; content reflows within the panel.

components.name: B Type - Accordion
components.description: Compound disclosure list (Accordion, Accordion.Item, Accordion.Trigger, Accordion.Content) with single/multiple modes and animated expansion.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: divided rows · B: separated cards.

notes: Trigger is a button with aria-expanded; content region is aria-labelledby the trigger.

components.responsive: Full width; content reflows within the panel.

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.description: Hierarchical navigation trail with configurable separators and overflow collapsing.

figmaProperties.name: Items
figmaProperties.description: Array of { label, href, current, icon }.

figmaProperties.name: Max Items
figmaProperties.description: Collapse the middle once items exceed this count.

notes: Wrapped in <nav aria-label="Breadcrumb">; current page uses aria-current="page".

components.responsive: Collapses middle items on narrow viewports.

components.name: Pagination
components.description: Page navigation with previous/next controls and truncated page ranges.

notes: Wrapped in <nav aria-label="Pagination"; current page uses aria-current="page".

components.responsive: Reduces visible page count on narrow viewports.

components.name: A Type - Card
components.description: Surface container with a compound API (Card, Card.Header, Card.Body, Card.Footer, Card.Media). Card.Header covers the standalone header pattern.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: vertical (stacked) · B: horizontal (media beside content) · C: overlay (media background).

notes: Interactive cards receive role/button semantics and keyboard activation.

components.responsive: Fills its column; media maintains aspect ratio.

components.name: B Type - Card
components.description: Surface container with a compound API (Card, Card.Header, Card.Body, Card.Footer, Card.Media). Card.Header covers the standalone header pattern.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: vertical (stacked) · B: horizontal (media beside content) · C: overlay (media background).

notes: Interactive cards receive role/button semantics and keyboard activation.

components.responsive: Fills its column; media maintains aspect ratio.

components.name: C Type - Card
components.description: Surface container with a compound API (Card, Card.Header, Card.Body, Card.Footer, Card.Media). Card.Header covers the standalone header pattern.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: vertical (stacked) · B: horizontal (media beside content) · C: overlay (media background).

notes: Interactive cards receive role/button semantics and keyboard activation.

components.responsive: Fills its column; media maintains aspect ratio.

components.name: A Type - ListItem
components.description: Row with leading media, title/description text and trailing content; optionally interactive/selectable.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: compact row · B: comfortable two-line.

notes: Interactive items render as a button with aria-current when selected.

components.responsive: Fills container width; trailing content wraps below on very narrow rows.

components.name: B Type - ListItem
components.description: Row with leading media, title/description text and trailing content; optionally interactive/selectable.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: compact row · B: comfortable two-line.

notes: Interactive items render as a button with aria-current when selected.

components.responsive: Fills container width; trailing content wraps below on very narrow rows.

components.name: Dropdown
components.description: Menu surface anchored to a trigger, with keyboard navigation and outside-click dismissal.

notes: Trigger exposes aria-haspopup + aria-expanded; items use role="menuitem".

components.responsive: Repositions via placement; menu constrained to viewport width.

components.name: A Type - SocialLogin
components.description: OAuth sign-in block. Two layout presets: Type A — full-width labelled buttons stacked with a divider and a secondary icon row; Type B — a compact centered grid of circular provider marks.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: full-width stack · B: icon grid.

notes: Rendered as a labelled <div role="group">; each provider is an individual button.

components.responsive: Fills container width; primary buttons stretch, the secondary row centers.

components.name: B Type - SocialLogin
components.description: OAuth sign-in block. Two layout presets: Type A — full-width labelled buttons stacked with a divider and a secondary icon row; Type B — a compact centered grid of circular provider marks.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: full-width stack · B: icon grid.

notes: Rendered as a labelled <div role="group">; each provider is an individual button.

components.responsive: Fills container width; primary buttons stretch, the secondary row centers.

components.name: EmptyState
components.description: Placeholder shown when there is no data, no results or an error — an icon, a title, a supporting message and an optional primary action.

notes: Renders in a `role="status"` region so screen readers announce the empty condition.

components.responsive: Centers within its container; the medallion and type scale with `size`.

components.name: Popover
components.description: Anchored overlay that floats arbitrary content next to a trigger. Positioned on a side × align grid with an optional arrow — the base primitive for Menu, Combobox, Autocomplete and DatePicker.

figmaProperties.name: Side
figmaProperties.description: Which side of the trigger the panel opens on.

notes: Trigger gets `aria-haspopup="dialog"`, `aria-expanded` and `aria-controls`.
Non-modal: closes on outside click and Escape; focus is not trapped (use Modal for that).

components.responsive: Panel width is content-driven with a max-width; flips are the caller’s responsibility (CSS-anchored).

components.name: Combobox
components.description: Single-select with type-to-filter. Composes the Input field with a filtered listbox popup and full keyboard navigation (ARIA combobox pattern).

keyboard: ArrowDown / ArrowUp: open + move active option
notes: Input carries `role="combobox"`, `aria-expanded`, `aria-controls`, `aria-autocomplete="list"` and `aria-activedescendant`.
The list is `role="listbox"`; each item is `role="option"` with `aria-selected`.

components.responsive: Fills container width; the listbox is anchored below and scrolls when tall.

components.name: Autocomplete
components.description: Free-text field with live suggestions. Unlike Combobox the typed value is preserved even without a selection — suitable for search boxes and async lookups (loading state included).

notes: Input carries `role="combobox"`, `aria-autocomplete="list"`, `aria-expanded`, `aria-controls`, `aria-activedescendant`.
Suggestions list is `role="listbox"` with `role="option"` items.

components.responsive: Fills container width; the suggestion list anchors below and scrolls when tall.

components.name: DatePicker
components.description: Single-date field with a calendar popup. Composes the Input with a month grid — pick by click or type an ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Min/max bounds disable out-of-range days.

keyboard: Enter / Space on trigger icon: open
Type an ISO date directly in the field
notes: Field is `role="combobox"` + `aria-haspopup="dialog"`; the calendar is a labelled `role="dialog"` with a `role="grid"` of days.
Selected day has `aria-selected`; today is marked; out-of-range days are `aria-disabled`.

components.responsive: Field fills container width; the calendar pops below and is fixed-width.

components.name: A Type - FileUpload
components.description: Drag-and-drop file input with click-to-browse, accept/size/count validation and a removable file list. Single or multiple files.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: full dropzone · B: compact inline row.

keyboard: Enter / Space: open the file picker
Tab: reach the dropzone and each remove button
notes: Dropzone is a labelled `role="button"`; the native file input is visually hidden.
Drag-over state is reflected via `data-dragging` for styling and is announced by the prompt text.

components.responsive: Dropzone fills container width; the file list stacks below.

components.name: B Type - FileUpload
components.description: Drag-and-drop file input with click-to-browse, accept/size/count validation and a removable file list. Single or multiple files.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: full dropzone · B: compact inline row.

keyboard: Enter / Space: open the file picker
Tab: reach the dropzone and each remove button
notes: Dropzone is a labelled `role="button"`; the native file input is visually hidden.
Drag-over state is reflected via `data-dragging` for styling and is announced by the prompt text.

components.responsive: Dropzone fills container width; the file list stacks below.

components.name: A Type - ImageUpload
components.description: Image-specific uploader: drag-and-drop or browse, with a thumbnail preview grid and per-image remove. Defaults to accepting images and rendering object-URL previews.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: wrapping grid · B: single-row strip.

keyboard: Enter / Space: open the file picker
Tab: reach the add tile and each remove button
notes: Add tile is a labelled `role="button"`; the native file input is visually hidden.
Each preview exposes a remove button labelled with the file name; previews use revoked object URLs.

components.responsive: Thumbnails wrap into a responsive grid; the add tile sits inline with them.

components.name: B Type - ImageUpload
components.description: Image-specific uploader: drag-and-drop or browse, with a thumbnail preview grid and per-image remove. Defaults to accepting images and rendering object-URL previews.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: wrapping grid · B: single-row strip.

keyboard: Enter / Space: open the file picker
Tab: reach the add tile and each remove button
notes: Add tile is a labelled `role="button"`; the native file input is visually hidden.
Each preview exposes a remove button labelled with the file name; previews use revoked object URLs.

components.responsive: Thumbnails wrap into a responsive grid; the add tile sits inline with them.

components.name: Menu
components.description: Composable action menu: a trigger plus freely-arranged MenuItem / MenuLabel / MenuSeparator children, with roving-focus keyboard navigation, icons and shortcut hints. Use over Dropdown when items need grouping, labels or custom content.

keyboard: ArrowDown / ArrowUp: move between items (wraps, skips disabled)
Escape: close and return focus to the trigger
notes: Trigger gets `aria-haspopup="menu"` and `aria-expanded`.
Container is `role="menu"`; items are `role="menuitem"`; separators `role="separator"`; labels `role="presentation"`.

components.responsive: Menu width is content-driven with a min-width; anchors to the trigger via placement.

components.name: A Type - BarChart
components.description: Categorical magnitude chart. Token-driven SVG bars anchored to the baseline with direct value labels (relief for the palette’s low-contrast hues). Type A: vertical columns · Type B: horizontal bars.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Orientation — A: vertical columns · B: horizontal bars.

notes: Rendered as `role="img"` with an `aria-label` summary; each bar has a `<title>` for hover.
Direct value labels satisfy the relief rule for low-contrast categorical hues.

components.responsive: SVG scales to the container width; height is fixed via the `height` prop.

components.name: B Type - BarChart
components.description: Categorical magnitude chart. Token-driven SVG bars anchored to the baseline with direct value labels (relief for the palette’s low-contrast hues). Type A: vertical columns · Type B: horizontal bars.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Orientation — A: vertical columns · B: horizontal bars.

notes: Rendered as `role="img"` with an `aria-label` summary; each bar has a `<title>` for hover.
Direct value labels satisfy the relief rule for low-contrast categorical hues.

components.responsive: SVG scales to the container width; height is fixed via the `height` prop.

components.name: A Type - LineChart
components.description: Change-over-time chart. Token-driven SVG with one axis, recessive gridlines, a legend for multiple series and direct end-labels. Type A: lines · Type B: filled area.

notes: Rendered as `role="img"` with an `aria-label` summary.
Legend + direct end-labels give identity beyond color (never color-alone).

components.responsive: SVG scales to the container width; height fixed via the `height` prop.

components.name: B Type - LineChart
components.description: Change-over-time chart. Token-driven SVG with one axis, recessive gridlines, a legend for multiple series and direct end-labels. Type A: lines · Type B: filled area.

notes: Rendered as `role="img"` with an `aria-label` summary.
Legend + direct end-labels give identity beyond color (never color-alone).

components.responsive: SVG scales to the container width; height fixed via the `height` prop.

components.name: A Type - DonutChart
components.description: Part-to-whole chart. Token-driven SVG segments with a 2px surface gap between slices, a legend carrying direct value/percent labels, and an optional center total. Type A: donut · Type B: pie.

figmaProperties.name: Total
figmaProperties.description: Center label (donut). Defaults to the sum.

notes: Rendered as `role="img"` with an `aria-label` summary.
Legend gives each slice a label + value/percent, so identity is never color-alone.

components.responsive: Chart is square and scales to width; legend wraps below.

components.name: B Type - DonutChart
components.description: Part-to-whole chart. Token-driven SVG segments with a 2px surface gap between slices, a legend carrying direct value/percent labels, and an optional center total. Type A: donut · Type B: pie.

figmaProperties.name: Total
figmaProperties.description: Center label (donut). Defaults to the sum.

notes: Rendered as `role="img"` with an `aria-label` summary.
Legend gives each slice a label + value/percent, so identity is never color-alone.

components.responsive: Chart is square and scales to width; legend wraps below.

components.name: A Type - RadarChart
components.description: Multivariate comparison chart. Token-driven SVG polar grid with one axis per variable, recessive concentric gridlines and a legend for multiple series. Type A: filled polygons · Type B: line-only outlines.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: A: translucent filled polygons · B: line-only outlines.

notes: Rendered as `role="img"` with an `aria-label` summary.
Legend + per-vertex axis labels give identity beyond color (never color-alone).

components.responsive: SVG scales to the container width; the plot stays square via a fixed viewBox.

components.name: B Type - RadarChart
components.description: Multivariate comparison chart. Token-driven SVG polar grid with one axis per variable, recessive concentric gridlines and a legend for multiple series. Type A: filled polygons · Type B: line-only outlines.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: A: translucent filled polygons · B: line-only outlines.

notes: Rendered as `role="img"` with an `aria-label` summary.
Legend + per-vertex axis labels give identity beyond color (never color-alone).

components.responsive: SVG scales to the container width; the plot stays square via a fixed viewBox.

components.name: A Type - Gauge
components.description: Single-value radial gauge. A recessive track arc with a token-driven value arc filled to the value ratio, plus a large tabular value read-out and label. Type A: 180° semicircle · Type B: 270° arc.

notes: Rendered as `role="meter"` with `aria-valuenow` / `aria-valuemin` / `aria-valuemax` and an `aria-label`.
The value read-out is shown as text, so identity never depends on the arc color alone.

components.responsive: SVG scales to the container width; aspect ratio fixed by the `size` prop and type.

components.name: B Type - Gauge
components.description: Single-value radial gauge. A recessive track arc with a token-driven value arc filled to the value ratio, plus a large tabular value read-out and label. Type A: 180° semicircle · Type B: 270° arc.

notes: Rendered as `role="meter"` with `aria-valuenow` / `aria-valuemin` / `aria-valuemax` and an `aria-label`.
The value read-out is shown as text, so identity never depends on the arc color alone.

components.responsive: SVG scales to the container width; aspect ratio fixed by the `size` prop and type.

components.name: A Type - ScatterChart
components.description: Correlation chart plotting (x, y) points on two numeric axes. Token-driven SVG with recessive gridlines, per-point hover tooltip and a legend for multiple series. Type A: points · Type B: points + linear (least-squares) trend line.

notes: Rendered as `role="img"` with an `aria-labelledby` summary.
Legend gives series identity beyond color (never color-alone).

components.responsive: SVG scales to the container width; height fixed via the `height` prop.

components.name: B Type - ScatterChart
components.description: Correlation chart plotting (x, y) points on two numeric axes. Token-driven SVG with recessive gridlines, per-point hover tooltip and a legend for multiple series. Type A: points · Type B: points + linear (least-squares) trend line.

notes: Rendered as `role="img"` with an `aria-labelledby` summary.
Legend gives series identity beyond color (never color-alone).

components.responsive: SVG scales to the container width; height fixed via the `height` prop.

components.name: A Type - Heatmap
components.description: Matrix magnitude chart. A single-hue sequential ramp encodes each cell value (light = low → dark = high) over `var(--chart-1)`, with row/column labels, a hover tooltip and a low→high scale legend. Type A: square cells · Type B: value labels shown in cells.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: A: 사각 셀 · B: 값 라벨 표시.

figmaProperties.name: Aria Label
figmaProperties.description: Accessible summary; falls back to an auto-generated matrix summary.

notes: Rendered as `role="img"` with an `aria-labelledby` summary (dimensions + min/max).
Magnitude is a single-hue sequential ramp; hover tooltips and Type B value labels give a non-color read of each cell.

components.responsive: CSS grid fills the container width; cells share a fixed aspect and reflow with it.

components.name: B Type - Heatmap
components.description: Matrix magnitude chart. A single-hue sequential ramp encodes each cell value (light = low → dark = high) over `var(--chart-1)`, with row/column labels, a hover tooltip and a low→high scale legend. Type A: square cells · Type B: value labels shown in cells.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: A: 사각 셀 · B: 값 라벨 표시.

figmaProperties.name: Aria Label
figmaProperties.description: Accessible summary; falls back to an auto-generated matrix summary.

notes: Rendered as `role="img"` with an `aria-labelledby` summary (dimensions + min/max).
Magnitude is a single-hue sequential ramp; hover tooltips and Type B value labels give a non-color read of each cell.

components.responsive: CSS grid fills the container width; cells share a fixed aspect and reflow with it.

components.name: A Type - Alert
components.description: Contextual message with tone-driven icon, optional title, action and dismissal. Type A/B/C are layout presets: A — inline, B — full-width banner, C — prominent (left accent bar).

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: inline · B: banner (full-width) · C: prominent (accent bar).

notes: role="alert" announces the message; icon is decorative.

components.responsive: Fills container; content wraps and action drops below on narrow widths.

components.name: B Type - Alert
components.description: Contextual message with tone-driven icon, optional title, action and dismissal. Type A/B/C are layout presets: A — inline, B — full-width banner, C — prominent (left accent bar).

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: inline · B: banner (full-width) · C: prominent (accent bar).

notes: role="alert" announces the message; icon is decorative.

components.responsive: Fills container; content wraps and action drops below on narrow widths.

components.name: C Type - Alert
components.description: Contextual message with tone-driven icon, optional title, action and dismissal. Type A/B/C are layout presets: A — inline, B — full-width banner, C — prominent (left accent bar).

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: inline · B: banner (full-width) · C: prominent (accent bar).

notes: role="alert" announces the message; icon is decorative.

components.responsive: Fills container; content wraps and action drops below on narrow widths.

components.name: A Type - Modal
components.description: Accessible dialog rendered in a portal with focus trapping, scroll lock and scrim dismissal.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Presentation preset — A: centered dialog · B: bottom sheet · C: fullscreen.

notes: role="dialog" aria-modal; labelled by the title; focus returns to the trigger on close.

components.responsive: Sizes cap at viewport width with margins; `full` covers the screen on mobile.

components.name: B Type - Modal
components.description: Accessible dialog rendered in a portal with focus trapping, scroll lock and scrim dismissal.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Presentation preset — A: centered dialog · B: bottom sheet · C: fullscreen.

notes: role="dialog" aria-modal; labelled by the title; focus returns to the trigger on close.

figmaProperties.description: Presentation preset — A: centered dialog · B: bottom sheet · C: fullscreen.

components.name: A Type - Drawer
components.description: Edge-anchored panel (portal + focus trap) that slides in from any side.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Form-factor preset — A: flush (edge-anchored) · B: floating (inset card) · C: full (fills the cross axis).

notes: role="dialog" aria-modal; labelled by the title; focus returns to the trigger on close.

components.responsive: Left/right panels become full-width bottom sheets on mobile.

components.name: B Type - Drawer
components.description: Edge-anchored panel (portal + focus trap) that slides in from any side.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Form-factor preset — A: flush (edge-anchored) · B: floating (inset card) · C: full (fills the cross axis).

notes: role="dialog" aria-modal; labelled by the title; focus returns to the trigger on close.

components.responsive: Left/right panels become full-width bottom sheets on mobile.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Form-factor preset — A: flush (edge-anchored) · B: floating (inset card) · C: full (fills the cross axis).

components.name: A Type - Toast
components.description: Transient notification managed by ToastProvider/useToast, with tone, action and auto-dismiss.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: compact · B: rich with title/actions.

notes: role="status" with aria-live="polite"; errors use assertive.

components.responsive: Anchored to a viewport corner; full-width on mobile.

components.name: B Type - Toast
components.description: Transient notification managed by ToastProvider/useToast, with tone, action and auto-dismiss.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: compact · B: rich with title/actions.

notes: role="status" with aria-live="polite"; errors use assertive.

components.responsive: Anchored to a viewport corner; full-width on mobile.

components.name: A Type - Table
components.description: Data grid with column config, density, striping/bordering, sticky header, sortable columns, row selection and a loading state.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: comfortable · B: compact density.

notes: Semantic <table> with scoped <th>; caption provides an accessible name.
Sortable headers are buttons exposing aria-sort; selection uses aria-selected on rows.

components.responsive: Horizontally scrolls within its container (min-width: max-content).

components.name: B Type - Table
components.description: Data grid with column config, density, striping/bordering, sticky header, sortable columns, row selection and a loading state.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: comfortable · B: compact density.

notes: Semantic <table> with scoped <th>; caption provides an accessible name.
Sortable headers are buttons exposing aria-sort; selection uses aria-selected on rows.

components.responsive: Horizontally scrolls within its container (min-width: max-content).

components.name: A Type - Header
components.description: Application top bar with brand, primary navigation and action slots. Type A/B/C are layout presets: A — standard (brand · nav · actions), B — centered brand with nav below, C — compact (nav hidden).

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: standard · B: centered brand · C: compact.

notes: Rendered as <header role="banner"> with a <nav> landmark for links.

components.responsive: Navigation collapses behind a menu button below the tablet breakpoint.

components.name: B Type - Header
components.description: Application top bar with brand, primary navigation and action slots. Type A/B/C are layout presets: A — standard (brand · nav · actions), B — centered brand with nav below, C — compact (nav hidden).

figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: standard · B: centered brand · C: compact.

components.name: A Type - Footer
components.description: Site footer. Type A/B/C are layout presets: A — multi-column links + bottom bar, B — simple centered brand + social, C — minimal single row.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: columns · B: simple · C: minimal.

notes: Rendered as <footer role="contentinfo"> with <nav> landmarks for link groups.

components.responsive: Columns collapse to a stacked list below the tablet breakpoint; bottom bar wraps.

components.name: B Type - Footer
components.description: Site footer. Type A/B/C are layout presets: A — multi-column links + bottom bar, B — simple centered brand + social, C — minimal single row.

components.name: A Type - Sidebar
components.description: Vertical navigation rail with a compound API (Sidebar, Sidebar.Section, Sidebar.Item) and a collapsed icon-only mode.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Density / grouping preset — A: standard · B: compact (condensed) · C: boxed (sections in cards).

notes: Rendered as <nav>; active item uses aria-current="page".

components.responsive: Collapses to an icon rail on tablet; hidden behind a Drawer on mobile.

components.name: B Type - Sidebar
components.description: Vertical navigation rail with a compound API (Sidebar, Sidebar.Section, Sidebar.Item) and a collapsed icon-only mode.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Density / grouping preset — A: standard · B: compact (condensed) · C: boxed (sections in cards).

notes: Rendered as <nav>; active item uses aria-current="page".

components.responsive: Collapses to an icon rail on tablet; hidden behind a Drawer on mobile.

components.name: C Type - Sidebar
components.description: Vertical navigation rail with a compound API (Sidebar, Sidebar.Section, Sidebar.Item) and a collapsed icon-only mode.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Density / grouping preset — A: standard · B: compact (condensed) · C: boxed (sections in cards).

notes: Rendered as <nav>; active item uses aria-current="page".

components.responsive: Collapses to an icon rail on tablet; hidden behind a Drawer on mobile.

components.name: A Type - Navbar
components.description: Declarative navigation bar: pass a list of links and it renders them with active-state handling (aria-current), an alignment axis and a responsive collapse into a mobile panel. Slot-based Header is the alternative when you need a custom layout.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: single inline row · B: brand+actions row with nav below.

keyboard: Enter / Space toggles the mobile menu button
notes: Rendered as `<nav aria-label>`; the active link carries `aria-current="page"`.
Below the tablet breakpoint links collapse behind a toggle button controlling an `aria-expanded` panel.

components.responsive: Links show inline on tablet+, and collapse into a togglable panel on mobile.

components.name: B Type - Navbar
components.description: Declarative navigation bar: pass a list of links and it renders them with active-state handling (aria-current), an alignment axis and a responsive collapse into a mobile panel. Slot-based Header is the alternative when you need a custom layout.

figmaProperties.name: Type
figmaProperties.description: Layout preset — A: single inline row · B: brand+actions row with nav below.

keyboard: Enter / Space toggles the mobile menu button
notes: Rendered as `<nav aria-label>`; the active link carries `aria-current="page"`.
Below the tablet breakpoint links collapse behind a toggle button controlling an `aria-expanded` panel.

components.responsive: Links show inline on tablet+, and collapse into a togglable panel on mobile.
